name: proxmox-gui
description: Kiosk monitoring UI for a Proxmox homelab on a 1424x280 1U touchscreen

scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/config.js && node --check server/upstream.js && node --check server/demo.js && node --check public/app.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('config/cards.json'))"
